# Quaternion Rotations

> Quaternion-based 3D rotations (gimbal-lock free)

**Category:** Integration · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** integration · godot

## What this does

Quaternion-based 3D rotations (gimbal-lock free)

Specifies 6 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Creation From Euler** — when Convert Euler angles to quaternion is requested, then Convert Euler angles to quaternion completed.
- **Creation From Axis Angle** — when Rotate by axis and angle is requested, then Rotate by axis and angle completed.
- **Quaternion Multiplication** — when Compose rotations is requested, then Compose rotations completed.
- **Interpolation** — when Smooth rotation blending (SLERP) is requested, then Smooth rotation blending (SLERP) completed.
- **To Euler Conversion** — when Convert quaternion back to angles is requested, then Convert quaternion back to angles completed.
- **Vector Rotation** — when Apply quaternion rotation to vector is requested, then Apply quaternion rotation to vector completed.
